title.purpose: Card, Drawer, Sheet, and section titles.

action.purpose: Buttons, menu items, and interactive labels.

shadows.name: floating-shell
shadows.purpose: Floating sidebar and highest overlay shells only.

motion.name: state-change
motion.purpose: Default shadcn color, background, ring, and transform feedback.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The single high-emphasis action in a control group.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { height: 2.25rem; padding: 0.5rem 0.75rem; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: calc(var(--radius) * 2.6); background: var(--primary); color: var(--primary-foreground); font: 500 0.875rem/1.25rem var(--font-sans); transition: background-color 150ms, box-shadow 150ms, transform 150ms; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: color-mix(in oklch, var(--primary) 80%, transparent); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { border-color: var(--ring); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px color-mix(in oklch, var(--ring) 30%, transparent); outline: none; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(1px); }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: A restrained secondary action on the current surface.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { height: 2.25rem; padding: 0.5rem 0.75rem; border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: calc(var(--radius) * 2.6); background: var(--background); color: var(--foreground); font: 500 0.875rem/1.25rem var(--font-sans); transition: background-color 150ms, box-shadow 150ms, transform 150ms; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: var(--muted); } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { border-color: var(--ring); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px color-mix(in oklch, var(--ring) 30%, transparent); outline: none; } .ds-btn-outline:active { transform: translateY(1px); }

components.name: Destructive Button
components.description: A destructive action without a full-saturation red block.
components.css: .ds-btn-destructive { height: 2.25rem; padding: 0.5rem 0.75rem; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: calc(var(--radius) * 2.6); background: color-mix(in oklch, var(--destructive) 10%, transparent); color: var(--destructive); font: 500 0.875rem/1.25rem var(--font-sans); transition: background-color 150ms, box-shadow 150ms, transform 150ms; } .ds-btn-destructive:hover { background: color-mix(in oklch, var(--destructive) 20%, transparent); } .ds-btn-destructive:focus-visible { border-color: color-mix(in oklch, var(--destructive) 40%, transparent); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px color-mix(in oklch, var(--destructive) 20%, transparent); outline: none; } .ds-btn-destructive:active { transform: translateY(1px); }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: The default Base UI text field for all forms.
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; height: 2.25rem; padding: 0.25rem 0.75rem; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: calc(var(--radius) * 2.2); background: color-mix(in oklch, var(--input) 50%, transparent); color: var(--foreground); font: 400 0.875rem/1.25rem var(--font-sans); transition: background-color 150ms, border-color 150ms, box-shadow 150ms; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: var(--muted-foreground); } .ds-input:hover { background: color-mix(in oklch, var(--input) 65%, transparent); } .ds-input:focus-visible { border-color: var(--ring); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px color-mix(in oklch, var(--ring) 30%, transparent); outline: none; }

components.name: Primary Badge
components.description: A compact status label that always carries text meaning.
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: fit-content; height: 1.25rem; padding: 0.125rem 0.5rem; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: calc(var(--radius) * 2.2); background: var(--primary); color: var(--primary-foreground); font: 500 0.75rem/1rem var(--font-sans); white-space: nowrap; }

components.name: Operational Card
components.description: A single bounded group for related configuration or metrics.
components.html:
Provider health

All configured providers are ready.
components.css: .ds-card { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.375rem; padding: 1.5rem; border-radius: calc(var(--radius) * 2.6); background: var(--card); color: var(--card-foreground); box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px color-mix(in oklch, var(--foreground) 5%, transparent); } .ds-card h3 { margin: 0; font: 500 1rem/1.5rem var(--font-heading); } .ds-card p { margin: 0; color: var(--muted-foreground); font: 400 0.875rem/1.25rem var(--font-sans); }

components.name: Active Sidebar Item
components.description: The current destination in the floating operational sidebar.
components.css: .ds-nav-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; height: 2.25rem; padding: 0.5rem 0.75rem; border-radius: calc(var(--radius) * 1.4); background: var(--sidebar-accent); color: var(--sidebar-accent-foreground); font: 500 0.875rem/1.25rem var(--font-sans); text-decoration: none; transition: background-color 150ms, box-shadow 150ms; } .ds-nav-item svg { width: 1rem; height: 1rem; fill: none; stroke: currentColor; stroke-width: 2; stroke-linecap: round; stroke-linejoin: round; } .ds-nav-item:hover { background: color-mix(in oklch, var(--sidebar-accent) 85%, var(--sidebar-foreground)); } .ds-nav-item:focus-visible { box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px var(--sidebar-ring); outline: none; }

components.name: Data Table Row
components.description: A dense, readable table row with quiet hover feedback.
components.css: .ds-table { width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; color: var(--foreground); font: 400 0.875rem/1.25rem var(--font-sans); } .ds-table tr { border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); transition: background-color 150ms; } .ds-table tr:hover { background: color-mix(in oklch, var(--muted) 50%, transparent); } .ds-table td { padding: 0.75rem; white-space: nowrap; }

narrative.overview: This system should feel like working in a quiet control tower: the global state is clear, critical exceptions stand out, and every action produces definite feedback. It uses shadcn base-luma's mature control language to carry complex provider configuration, routing diagnostics, and usage data without letting brand expression obstruct the task. The visual language must be restrained, reliable, and clear. Familiarity comes from standard Base UI interactions, structure built from the olive scale, and teal that appears only at points of action. Product pages must never reinvent buttons, inputs, overlays, or navigation with one-off styling.
keyCharacteristics: shadcn base-luma and Base UI primitives are the only component baseline.
Olive structure carries hierarchy; signal teal is reserved for primary actions, focus, and critical data.
Information is dense, but hierarchy stays quiet and state always outranks decoration.
Light and dark themes share the same semantic roles; product components never hardcode colors.
Motion explains state changes only; page-load choreography is forbidden.

rules.name: The Signal Rarity Rule
rules.body: Teal is reserved for actions, focus, and data encoding. A static page must never show large teal areas for decoration.

rules.name: The Semantic Theme Rule
rules.body: Components may use only semantic tokens such as primary, muted, and border. Dark mode swaps role values in src/styles.css; product code must never name concrete color steps.

rules.name: The Lexend Boundary Rule
rules.body: Lexend is for headings only, never buttons, table body text, form labels, or data values.

rules.name: The shadcn Elevation Rule
rules.body: Use the elevation supplied by shared components. Product pages must not add custom box shadows, glass blur, or arbitrary z-index values.

dos: Do use an existing shadcn component from src/components/ui first; add missing components through the shadcn CLI.
Do use semantic color tokens and share the same component code across light and dark themes.
Do keep the default 36px control height, 4px spacing baseline, and shared corner proportions.
Do preserve hover, focus-visible, active, disabled, and error states for every interactive control.
Do make errors and status copy identify the next step while preserving keyboard operation, visible focus, and clear contrast.
donts: Don't create a flashy SaaS marketing-site style: decorative gradients, glass effects, marketing copy, and task-irrelevant motion are forbidden.
Don't duplicate Button, Input, Badge, Table, Sheet, Dialog, or Sidebar styling in product pages.
Don't use teal to decorate icons, headings, or large backgrounds; it belongs only to actions, focus, and necessary data encoding.
Don't use nested cards, colored side stripes, gradient text, arbitrary box shadows, or z-index: 9999.
Don't use color alone to communicate success, failure, enabled, disabled, or selected states.
